name: Super Action Heros
description: Poseable action figure with 20 points of articulation. Comes with multiple accessories and weapons. Perfect for imaginative play and collecting.

name: Classic Wooden Blocks
description: Set of 50 colorful wooden building blocks in various shapes and sizes. Great for developing motor skills and creativity in young children.

name: Galaxy Explorer Spaceship
description: Build your own spaceship with this 200-piece building set. Features light-up engines, opening cockpit, and detachable landing module.

name: Junior Doctor Kit
description: Pretend play medical kit with stethoscope, thermometer, syringe, and other tools. Encourages role play and helps children understand healthcare.

name: Strategy Master Board Game
description: Classic strategy board game for 2-4 players. Develop critical thinking skills while having fun with family and friends. Average playtime: 60 minutes.

name: Plush Teddy Bear
description: Super soft huggable teddy bear made with premium materials. Hypoallergenic and machine washable. Perfect for cuddling at bedtime.

name: RC Racing Car
description: High-speed remote control car with responsive controls and durable construction. Features LED lights and can perform stunts and flips.

name: Fashion Designer Doll
description: Poseable fashion doll with 5 outfits and accessories. Includes fashion design sketchbook and fabric swatches for creative play.

name: Outdoor Adventure Set
description: Complete outdoor exploration kit with binoculars, compass, magnifying glass, and bug container. Perfect for young explorers and nature lovers.

name: Musical Keyboard
description: Beginner's electronic keyboard with 37 keys, 100 sounds, and 50 demo songs. Features recording function and headphone jack for quiet practice.

name: Dinosaur Excavation Kit
description: Dig up and assemble a realistic dinosaur skeleton. Includes tools, brush, and educational booklet about prehistoric creatures.

name: Baby's First Blocks
description: Soft fabric blocks with different textures, colors, and sounds. Perfect for sensory development in infants and babies.

name: Cooperative Adventure Game
description: Family board game where players work together to overcome challenges. Promotes teamwork and problem-solving skills. 2-6 players.

name: Superhero Costume Set
description: High-quality costume with cape, mask, and wristbands. Machine washable and durable for everyday superhero adventures.

name: Science Experiment Kit
description: Perform 50+ amazing science experiments with this comprehensive kit. Includes lab equipment and detailed instruction manual.

name: Barbie doll
description: Who is Barbie? Barbie is an 11-inch- (29-cm-) tall plastic doll with the figure of an adult woman that was originally modeled on the Lilli doll (produced in West Germany from 1955 to 1964), a risqué gag gift for men. The Barbie target demographic is young children

name: Toy Guns
description: Toy Guns means any imitation of any original firearm that was manufactured, designed and produced since 1898, including water guns, replica non-guns, air-soft guns firing non-metallic projectiles, and B-B, paint-ball, and pellet-firing air guns that expel a projectile through the force of air pressure, or any other ...

name: Archery Toys
description: Archery is a bow and arrow sport that uses a bow and arrow to shoot at a target. The target often consists of ten concentric circles, and points are awarded based on which circle the bow lands in. Archery can be an individual activity/sport. It can also be a team sport.
